response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff-level software engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, distributed systems, and AWS. However, he falls significantly short of the core requirement of 8+ years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions. While his most recent role touches on AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, the vast majority of his background is in traditional backend, GIS, and web development. He lacks the necessary deep, sustained expertise in Python, RAG architectures, and vector databases required for this GenAI-focused role.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level engineering experience with strong proficiency in TypeScript and Node.js.
Demonstrated experience building scalable cloud infrastructure, microservices, and using AWS CDK.
Relevant recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions.
No explicit mention of Python, vector databases, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines in his profile.
AI development experience is limited to a single, very recent position rather than a sustained career focus.
